skills.description: Box Least Squares (BLS) periodogram for detecting transiting exoplanets and eclipsing binaries. Use when searching for periodic box-shaped dips in light curves. Alternative to Transit Least Squares...

Preprocessing and cleaning techniques for astronomical light curves. Use when preparing light curve data for period analysis, including outlier removal, trend removal, flattening, and handling data...

Lomb-Scargle periodogram for finding periodic signals in unevenly sampled time series data. Use when analyzing light curves, radial velocity data, or any astronomical time series to detect periodic...
